elementary.title: A2 First conditional and future time clauses
elementary.content:
📌 First Conditional – Điều kiện loại 1
Câu điều kiện loại 1 dùng để nói về những tình huống có thể xảy ra trong tương lai.

Mệnh đề if (If clause)Mệnh đề chính (Main clause)
If + present simplewill / can / must / should / may / might + V nguyên mẫu
If it rains,we will stay home.
If you don't study,you might fail the exam.

⚠️ KHÔNG dùng will trong mệnh đề if!
❌ If it will rain, we will stay home.
✅ If it rains, we will stay home.

Khi mệnh đề if đứng trước, dùng dấu phẩy. Khi đứng sau, không cần dấu phẩy.
✅ If I'm late, I'll call you. / I'll call you if I'm late.
⏰ Future Time Clauses – Mệnh đề thời gian tương lai
Dùng when, after, before, until, as soon as + present simple để nói về tương lai (KHÔNG dùng will sau các từ này).

Từ nốiNghĩaVí dụ
whenkhiI'll call you when I arrive.
as soon asngay khiAs soon as she finishes, she'll call.
beforetrước khiSay goodbye before you leave.
aftersau khiAfter you eat, we'll go out.
untilcho đến khiWait here until I come back.

❌ I'll call you when I will arrive. ✅ I'll call you when I arrive.
🔗 Unless = If ... not
Unless = if ... not (trừ khi / nếu không)
• I won't go unless you come. = I won't go if you don't come.
• She'll be late unless she hurries. = She'll be late if she doesn't hurry.

exercises.q: If it ___ tomorrow, we will cancel the picnic.
exercises.exp: Mệnh đề if dùng present simple

exercises.q: I'll call you as soon as I ___ home.
If you ___ hard, you will pass the exam.
She'll be happy ___ she hears the news.
exercises.exp: When + present simple cho tương lai

exercises.q: We won't leave ___ everyone is ready.
If he doesn't hurry, he ___ the bus.
I'll start cooking ___ you arrive.
___ she studies more, she might not pass.
After you ___ your homework, you can watch TV.
If I ___ free tomorrow, I'll come to your party.
We'll play football if the weather ___.
exercises.opts: is good,will be good,was good,would be good

exercises.q: Call me ___ you need help.
As soon as the film ___, we'll go home.
I won't eat anything ___ she comes.
If you ___ the answer, raise your hand.
She'll send you the report ___ she finishes it.
You ___ sick if you eat too much.
I'll wait here ___ you come back.
If she ___ the job, she'll move to London.
exercises.exp: Present simple trong mệnh đề if

exercises.q: Before you ___, don't forget to lock the door.
If you ___ (not/hurry), you will be late.
exercises.exp: Phủ định present simple trong if clause

exercises.q: I'll text you when I ___ (arrive) at the station.
She ___ (be) angry if you don't apologize.
We'll have dinner after he ___ (come) home.
If it ___ (not/rain), we'll go for a walk.
As soon as class ___ (finish), I'll call you.
Unless you ___ (study), you won't pass.
He ___ (can/leave) when he finishes his work.
I'll stay here until she ___ (call) me.
If he ___ (not/be) careful, he will have an accident.
Before you ___ (go) to bed, brush your teeth.
She ___ (might/feel) better if she rests.
When I ___ (be) older, I'll travel the world.
We ___ (not/go) out unless it stops raining.
exercises.exp: Main clause phủ định với will

exercises.q: If she ___ (pass) the test, she'll celebrate.
I'll call you as soon as I ___ (get) the results.
If you ___ (eat) too much sugar, you'll get a toothache.
He ___ (must/study) harder if he wants to improve.
After you ___ (finish) eating, please wash the dishes.
Unless she ___ (apologize), I won't talk to her.

reorder.words: If it rains , we will stay inside
I will call you when I arrive
She will be late unless she hurries
As soon as he finishes , he will call me
Before you leave , say goodbye to everyone
If you study hard , you will pass the exam
We will wait here until she comes back
After we eat dinner , we will go for a walk
If he is late , we will start without him
I will be happy when I hear the good news
Unless you apologize , she will be angry
She will send the report as soon as she finishes it
If you are tired , you should go to bed
He will not leave until he finishes his homework
If the weather is nice tomorrow , we will have a picnic
I will not eat unless I am really hungry
Call me if you need any help
Before she goes to sleep , she will read a book
If you miss the bus , you will be late
We will not start the film until everyone arrives

passage.text: My family {{1}} (plan) a holiday next month. If the weather {{2}} (be) good, we {{3}} (go) to the beach. We {{4}} (leave) early in the morning before it {{5}} (get) too hot. When we {{6}} (arrive), we {{7}} (find) a good spot near the sea. If the children {{8}} (get) hungry, we {{9}} (buy) some food at the café. We {{10}} (stay) until the sun {{11}} (go) down. As soon as we {{12}} (come) home, I {{13}} (cook) dinner.

Tom {{1}} (take) his driving test next week. If he {{2}} (pass), he {{3}} (buy) a car. Before he {{4}} (take) the test, he {{5}} (practise) every day. When he {{6}} (feel) nervous, his instructor {{7}} (help) him. He {{8}} (not/give up) unless the test {{9}} (be) too difficult. As soon as the results {{10}} (come) out, he {{11}} (call) his parents.

If it {{1}} (snow) this winter, the children {{2}} (be) very happy. They {{3}} (play) outside as soon as they {{4}} (see) the snow. Their mother {{5}} (make) hot chocolate before they {{6}} (come) inside. If they {{7}} (catch) a cold, she {{8}} (take) them to the doctor. She {{9}} (not/let) them go out unless they {{10}} (wear) warm clothes.

Anna {{1}} (start) a new job next Monday. If the work {{2}} (be) interesting, she {{3}} (stay) there for a long time. She {{4}} (work) hard until her boss {{5}} (notice) her effort. When she {{6}} (earn) enough money, she {{7}} (buy) a new laptop. If her colleagues {{8}} (be) friendly, she {{9}} (enjoy) the job. She {{10}} (call) her friend as soon as she {{11}} (finish) her first day.

If the concert {{1}} (not/be) too expensive, we {{2}} (buy) tickets. Before we {{3}} (go), we {{4}} (check) the weather. Unless it {{5}} (rain), we {{6}} (walk) to the venue. When we {{7}} (get) there, we {{8}} (find) our seats. If the band {{9}} (play) our favourite song, we {{10}} (sing) along. After the show {{11}} (end), we {{12}} (have) dinner at a nearby restaurant.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về kế hoạch cuối tuần của bạn nếu thời tiết đẹp. Mô tả chi tiết bạn sẽ đi đâu, làm gì, đi với ai và bạn sẽ làm gì nếu trời mưa thay vào đó.
writing_prompts.example: If the weather is nice this weekend, I will go to the park with my friends and have a picnic near the lake. We will bring some homemade food and play games together. If we get hungry later, we will buy some ice cream from the vendor. However, if it rains, we will stay home and watch a film instead.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả những gì bạn sẽ làm khi hoàn thành khóa học tiếng Anh này. Dùng when, after, as soon as để nói về kế hoạch tương lai của bạn.
writing_prompts.example: As soon as I finish this English course, I will look for an international job where I can use my skills every day. When I can speak English fluently, I will travel abroad and meet people from different countries. After I pass my final exam, I will celebrate with my family and friends. Before I leave my hometown, I will also practise speaking with native speakers online.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một quyết định quan trọng bạn sắp đưa ra (thay đổi công việc, học trường mới, chuyển nhà,...). Dùng câu điều kiện loại 1 và unless để nói về các khả năng khác nhau.
writing_prompts.example: I am considering a new job offer in another city, and I will accept it if the salary is better than my current one. Unless the working hours are too long, I will definitely say yes to the manager. If I get the job, I will move to Ho Chi Minh City next month and find a new apartment. If everything goes well in the first three months, I will invite my parents to visit me there.

writing_prompts.vi: Bạn đang lên kế hoạch cho một chuyến đi nước ngoài. Viết về những gì bạn sẽ làm trước khi đi, khi đến nơi, và sau khi về. Dùng before, when, after, as soon as.
hint_words: when I arrive at the airport
as soon as I settle in
writing_prompts.example: Before I leave for Japan next summer, I will book all my tickets and hotels carefully to avoid any problems. As soon as I land at the airport, I will exchange some money and buy a local SIM card. When I arrive at my hotel, I will unpack and take a short rest. After I feel better, I will explore the nearby streets and try authentic Japanese food at a local restaurant.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết lời khuyên cho một người bạn đang chuẩn bị thi đại học. Dùng câu điều kiện loại 1 với if, unless, và when để đưa ra lời khuyên cụ thể.
writing_prompts.example: If you study a little every day instead of cramming at the last minute, you will feel much more confident on exam day. Unless you get enough sleep every night, you won't be able to concentrate during the test and remember what you have studied. When you feel very stressed, you should take a short break and do some light exercise to clear your mind. If you practise with past exam papers regularly, you will know the format well and manage your time better.

elementary.title: A2 Second conditional
elementary.content:
📌 Second Conditional – Điều kiện loại 2
Câu điều kiện loại 2 dùng để nói về những tình huống giả định, không có thật hoặc khó xảy ra ở hiện tại hoặc tương lai.

Mệnh đề ifMệnh đề chính
If + past simplewould / could / might + V nguyên mẫu
If I had more time,I would travel the world.
If she were taller,she could be a model.

⚠️ KHÔNG dùng would trong mệnh đề if!
❌ If I would have money, I would buy a car.
✅ If I had money, I would buy a car.

Were thay cho was với I/he/she/it trong văn viết trang trọng:
✅ If I were you, I'd apologize. (= If I was you...)
🔄 So sánh First vs Second Conditional
First ConditionalSecond Conditional
Khả năngCó thể xảy ra ✅Không có thật / khó xảy ra ❌
Cấu trúcif + present, will + Vif + past, would + V
Ví dụIf I find £100, I will buy a gift.If I found £100, I would save it.
💡 Dùng Second Conditional để cho lời khuyên
Cấu trúc If I were you, I would... rất phổ biến để cho lời khuyên:
• If I were you, I would talk to the teacher.
• If I were you, I wouldn't worry about it.
• What would you do if you won the lottery?

exercises.q: If I ___ a lot of money, I would buy a big house.
She would travel more if she ___ more holidays.
If I were you, I ___ apologize immediately.
What would you do if you ___ the lottery?
exercises.exp: Past simple trong câu hỏi 2nd conditional

exercises.q: If he ___ harder, he might get promoted.
I ___ a doctor if I could choose any job.
If she ___ taller, she could be a basketball player.
He wouldn't be so tired if he ___ to bed earlier.
If we lived near the sea, we ___ swimming every day.
What ___ you do if you saw a ghost?
If I ___ you, I wouldn't say that.
She ___ happier if she had a different job.
If they ___ in Paris, they'd visit the Eiffel Tower every week.
I ___ English every day if I had more free time.
If he had a car, he ___ drive to work.
If you ___ the answer, you'd tell me, wouldn't you?
We ___ more if the food were cheaper.
If I ___ a superhero, I would fly everywhere.
He ___ the exam if he studied more seriously.
If it weren't so cold, I ___ outside.
If I ___ (be) rich, I would donate to charity.
She ___ (travel) more if she had more money.
If he ___ (not/be) so shy, he'd have more friends.
exercises.exp: Phủ định weren't trong if clause

exercises.q: What would you buy if you ___ (win) the lottery?
If I were you, I ___ (not/take) that job.
They ___ (could/live) abroad if they spoke another language.
If she ___ (have) more time, she'd learn to play the piano.
He ___ (might/get) the job if he were more confident.
If animals ___ (can/speak), what would they say?
I ___ (be) very happy if I lived by the sea.
If it ___ (not/rain) so much, we'd go out more often.
exercises.exp: Phủ định past simple trong if clause

exercises.q: She ___ (not/be) so stressed if she had a shorter commute.
If I ___ (know) his number, I'd call him now.
He ___ (go) to university if his grades were better.
If we ___ (live) in the city, we wouldn't need a car.
What ___ (you/do) if you saw an accident?
She ___ (buy) a new phone if the old one broke.
If I ___ (be) taller, I could play basketball better.
They ___ (might/move) abroad if they found the right opportunity.
If he ___ (not/spend) so much money, he'd save more.

reorder.words: If I had more money , I would buy a car
She would be happier if she had a better job
If I were you , I would apologize
What would you do if you won the lottery ?
He could travel more if he had more holidays
If she spoke French , she would get the job
They would move to the countryside if they could
If it were not so cold , I would go swimming
I would call him if I knew his number
She might study abroad if she passed the exam
If we lived near the school , we would walk every day
What would you say if you met a famous person ?
He would not be tired if he slept more
If I were a bird , I would fly to warm countries
She could help more if she were not so busy
If they had a garden , they would grow vegetables
I would not worry if I were you
If he studied harder , he might pass the exam
She would feel better if she exercised regularly
If I could choose any job , I would be a teacher

passage.text: Maria often dreams about her ideal life. If she {{1}} (be) rich, she {{2}} (buy) a beautiful house by the sea. She {{3}} (also/travel) to many countries if she {{4}} (have) enough time and money. If she {{5}} (speak) three languages, she {{6}} (could/work) anywhere in the world. She {{7}} (not/need) to work so hard if her salary {{8}} (be) higher. If I {{9}} (be) Maria, I {{10}} (focus) on getting a better education first.

Tom is unhappy with his current situation. If he {{1}} (live) in a bigger city, he {{2}} (have) more career opportunities. He {{3}} (earn) more money if he {{4}} (have) a university degree. If he {{5}} (be) more confident, he {{6}} (might/apply) for better jobs. He {{7}} (not/feel) so lonely if he {{8}} (know) more people. What {{9}} (he/do) if he {{10}} (can/start) his life again?

Imagine a world without mobile phones. People {{1}} (talk) to each other more if they {{2}} (not/have) smartphones. Children {{3}} (might/play) outside more if screens {{4}} (not/exist). Families {{5}} (spend) more time together if they {{6}} (not/be) always online. If people {{7}} (read) more books, they {{8}} (could/learn) more. What {{9}} (you/do) if you {{10}} (have to) give up your phone for a week?

Lucy asked her friends: 'What {{1}} (you/do) if you {{2}} (can/be) anyone in the world?' Sam said: 'If I {{3}} (be) a scientist, I {{4}} (try) to cure diseases.' Anna replied: 'If I {{5}} (be) a singer, I {{6}} (record) albums and {{7}} (travel) everywhere.' Jack said: 'I {{8}} (help) poor people if I {{9}} (be) a politician. I {{10}} (not/waste) public money.'

The city would be better if some things {{1}} (change). There {{2}} (be) less traffic if more people {{3}} (use) public transport. The air {{4}} (could/be) cleaner if factories {{5}} (not/produce) so much pollution. People {{6}} (feel) safer if there {{7}} (be) more police on the streets. If the government {{8}} (build) more parks, families {{9}} (have) more places to relax. Life {{10}} (be) much nicer if everyone {{11}} (follow) the rules.

writing_prompts.vi: Nếu bạn có thể sống ở bất kỳ quốc gia nào trên thế giới, bạn sẽ chọn đâu và tại sao? Mô tả cuộc sống lý tưởng của bạn ở đó: bạn sẽ làm gì, sống như thế nào và gặp những ai.
writing_prompts.example: If I could live in any country, I would choose Japan because it has a perfect mix of tradition and modern life. I would learn Japanese every day and would feel proud when I could speak with local people. I would eat sushi and ramen every day, and I would explore beautiful temples and mountains at the weekend. Life would be very exciting and different from what I have now.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy nói về điều ước của bạn nếu bạn thắng xổ số 1 triệu đô. Bạn sẽ dùng tiền như thế nào? Bạn sẽ giúp đỡ ai? Cuộc sống của bạn sẽ thay đổi như thế nào?
writing_prompts.example: If I won one million dollars in the lottery, I would first buy a comfortable house for my parents so they wouldn't have to rent anymore. I would also donate a large amount to a local children's charity because I believe education is very important. After that, I would invest some of the money wisely and use the rest to travel the world with my closest friends. Life would change completely and I would feel very grateful every single day.

writing_prompts.vi: Bạn đang tư vấn cho một người bạn đang gặp vấn đề (như bị mất việc, chia tay, hoặc không đỗ đại học). Viết lời khuyên dùng 'If I were you...' và các cấu trúc điều kiện loại 2.
writing_prompts.example: I know you feel very sad about not getting into university this year, but if I were you, I would not give up and try again next year. I would use this free time to work part-time, save some money, and improve the subjects where you had difficulties. If I were in your situation, I would also talk to a teacher or a counsellor who could give me professional advice. You could feel much better soon if you made a positive plan and focused on what you can do right now.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả cuộc sống lý tưởng của bạn nếu bạn không phải lo lắng về tiền bạc. Bạn sẽ làm nghề gì? Bạn sẽ dành thời gian như thế nào? Bạn sẽ sống ở đâu?
hint_words: if I didn't have to worry about money
writing_prompts.example: If I didn't have to worry about money, I would become a full-time writer and spend my days creating stories that I truly love. I would live in a small cottage near the mountains or the sea where life would be peaceful and quiet. I would grow vegetables in my garden, read books all morning, and write in the afternoon. I would also volunteer to teach reading to children who couldn't afford private lessons, because I believe everyone deserves a chance to discover the magic of books.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về một thay đổi mà bạn muốn thực hiện trong cuộc sống nếu bạn dũng cảm hơn hoặc có nhiều thời gian hơn. Dùng các cấu trúc điều kiện loại 2 để diễn đạt ước mơ và kế hoạch.
hint_words: if I had more free time
would make the most of life
writing_prompts.example: If I were a little braver, I would leave my current office job and start my own small bakery business, because baking has always been my true passion. If I had more free time, I would also learn to paint and take long evening walks to clear my mind. I would feel much more fulfilled if I could do things that I genuinely love every day. I wouldn't regret any decision if I knew I was working towards my dreams and making the most of the life I have.

elementary.title: A2 Present and past simple passive: be + past participle
elementary.content:
📌 Câu bị động (Passive Voice) là gì?
Khi A làm B, ta có 2 cách diễn đạt:
• Chủ động (Active): A là chủ ngữ – nói về người/vật thực hiện hành động
• Bị động (Passive): B là chủ ngữ – nói về người/vật nhận hành động

✅ Somebody cleans the classroom every day. → Active
✅ The classroom is cleaned every day. → Passive

✅ Somebody broke the window. → Active
✅ The window was broken. → Passive
📐 Cấu trúc câu bị động
ThìCấu trúcVí dụ
Hiện tại
Present Simple		am / is / are + past participleEnglish is spoken in many countries.
The rooms are cleaned daily.
Quá khứ
Past Simple		was / were + past participleThe match was cancelled.
The emails weren't sent.
Phủ địnham/is/are/was/were + not + past participleThe report isn't written yet.
We weren't told the truth.
Câu hỏiAm/Is/Are/Was/Were + S + past participle?Is this product made in Vietnam?
Was the letter sent yesterday?
🎯 Khi nào dùng câu bị động?
• Khi không biết ai thực hiện hành động: A bank was robbed yesterday.
• Khi rõ ràng ai thực hiện: The robber was arrested. (by police – hiển nhiên)
• Khi không muốn nói ai làm: I was told that you were late.
• Khi chủ đề chính là vật/người nhận hành động: Penicillin was invented by Fleming.

Dùng by để nói ai thực hiện hành động:
✅ The painting was bought by a rich collector.
⚠️ Past Participle bất quy tắc thường gặp
VerbPast ParticipleVerbPast Participle
makemadebuildbuilt
writewrittentaketaken
sellsoldspeakspoken
givegivenfindfound
knowknownbreakbroken

exercises.q: English ___ all over the world.
exercises.exp: Present simple passive: is + past participle

exercises.q: The letter ___ yesterday.
exercises.exp: Past simple passive: was + past participle

exercises.q: These cars ___ in Japan.
The ancient temple ___ hundreds of years ago.
My wallet ___ on the bus yesterday.
___ this phone made in Korea?
exercises.exp: Present passive question với singular subject

exercises.q: The rooms ___ every morning by the hotel staff.
The match ___ because of heavy rain.
Spanish ___ in most of South America.
The injured player ___ to the hospital.
The report ___ yet. It's still being prepared.
exercises.opts: hasn't been written,isn't written,wasn't written,weren't written

exercises.q: Thousands of tourists ___ to the museum every year.
___ the emails sent this morning?
exercises.exp: Past passive question với plural: Were

exercises.q: The Eiffel Tower ___ in Paris in 1889.
This book ___ into 30 different languages.
The flowers ___ by a florist every week.
We ___ not told about the meeting yesterday.
The award ___ to the best student at the end of the year.
A new hospital ___ in our city last year.
Rice ___ in many Asian countries.
Millions of smartphones ___ (sell) every year.
The Great Wall of China ___ (build) over many centuries.
This newspaper ___ (not/print) on Sundays.
___ (the windows/clean) every week?
The actor ___ (interview) by a famous journalist last night.
French ___ (speak) in parts of Canada.
___ the car ___ (repair) yesterday?
The stolen jewellery ___ (find) by the police last week.
These products ___ (not/make) in this country.
The old bridge ___ (destroy) in the storm.
Cheese ___ (produce) in large quantities in France.
The students ___ (tell) about the exam last Friday.
The new law ___ (approve) by the government last month.
Hundreds of films ___ (release) every year in Hollywood.
The children ___ (not/give) enough information.
This song ___ (write) by a famous Vietnamese composer.
Fresh vegetables ___ (deliver) to the restaurant every morning.
The painting ___ (steal) from the museum two days ago.
The instructions ___ (not/explain) clearly to the new workers.
A lot of coffee ___ (grow) in Vietnam and Brazil.

reorder.words: English is spoken in many countries around the world
The letter was sent by the manager yesterday
These shoes are made in Italy
The window was broken by a ball
Is this product sold in supermarkets ?
The old building was destroyed in the storm last year
Rice is eaten by millions of people every day
Were the emails sent this morning ?
The robber was arrested by the police last night
Fresh fruit is delivered to the shop every morning
The book was written by a famous author
The students were told about the test on Monday
The new hospital was opened by the mayor last month
Are these phones made in South Korea ?
The match was cancelled because of bad weather
Thousands of cars are produced in this factory every year
The painting was bought by a rich collector
Spanish is spoken in most countries in South America
The injured people were taken to hospital immediately
The concert was watched by over ten thousand people

passage.text: The Rosetta Stone is one of the most famous objects in the world. It {{1}} (write) in three different languages around 196 BC. The stone {{2}} (find) in 1799 by French soldiers in Egypt. After the war, it {{3}} (take) to England. Most of the words on the stone {{4}} (translate) over many years, but the Egyptian picture-writing remained a mystery. That mystery {{5}} (not/solve) until 1822, when a French scholar called Champollion translated them. Today, the stone {{6}} (keep) in the British Museum in London. It {{7}} (visit) by millions of tourists every year. The stone {{8}} (consider) very important for our understanding of ancient Egypt. Without it, ancient Egyptian writing {{9}} (might/not/understand) today. The stone {{10}} (protect) very carefully by museum staff.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả chi tiết quy trình sản xuất một sản phẩm mà bạn yêu thích (cà phê, chocolate, điện thoại, áo quần,...). Dùng câu bị động để giải thích mỗi bước trong quy trình, từ nguyên liệu đến sản phẩm hoàn chỉnh.
writing_prompts.example: Chocolate is made from cacao beans which are grown mainly in countries in West Africa and South America. First, the beans are picked by hand and are left to dry in the sun for several days. Then they are transported to factories where they are roasted at high temperatures. After roasting, the beans are ground into a thick liquid called cocoa mass. Sugar and milk are added to this mixture and everything is stirred together. Finally, the chocolate is poured into moulds, cooled, and packaged before it is sold in shops all over the world.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một sự kiện hoặc tai nạn đã xảy ra ở địa phương bạn (như một vụ cướp, tai nạn giao thông, hỏa hoạn). Dùng câu bị động để mô tả những gì đã xảy ra và những gì đã được thực hiện sau đó.
writing_prompts.example: Last Tuesday evening, a local convenience store on my street was robbed by two men wearing masks. The police were called immediately by the shop owner and the area was closed off within minutes. Several witnesses were questioned by detectives and CCTV footage was examined carefully throughout the night. One of the suspects was identified from the video and was arrested the following morning at his home. The stolen money was found in his bag. The local community was informed about the incident through the neighbourhood news app, and people were advised to stay alert.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một danh lam thắng cảnh hoặc công trình nổi tiếng ở Việt Nam hoặc trên thế giới. Mô tả khi nào nó được xây dựng, ai xây dựng nó, và hiện tại nó được sử dụng như thế nào.
writing_prompts.example: Hoi An Ancient Town is one of the most beautiful places in Vietnam and is visited by millions of tourists every year. It was built during the 15th century and was used as an important trading port for centuries. The town is known for its well-preserved architecture which is influenced by Japanese, Chinese, and Vietnamese styles. In 1999, it was listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Today, the ancient streets are lit with colourful lanterns every evening and many cultural events are organised throughout the year. Visitors are offered boat trips on the Thu Bon River and are often amazed by the beauty of the old town.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết một bài báo ngắn về một phát minh quan trọng trong lịch sử (điện, điện thoại, máy tính,...). Dùng câu bị động để mô tả lịch sử của phát minh đó và ảnh hưởng của nó ngày nay.
writing_prompts.example: The internet is considered one of the most important inventions in human history. It was first developed by scientists in the United States in the late 1960s and was originally used only by the military and universities. The World Wide Web was created by Tim Berners-Lee in 1989 and was introduced to the public in the early 1990s. Today, billions of people are connected to the internet every day. Emails are sent, videos are watched, and products are bought and sold online every second. Vast amounts of data are stored in cloud servers around the world. It is impossible to imagine modern life without this incredible technology.

writing_prompts.vi: Bạn đang viết bài đăng mạng xã hội về một chuyến tham quan nhà máy hoặc cơ sở sản xuất. Mô tả chi tiết những gì bạn thấy, những công đoạn sản xuất nào được thực hiện, và bạn cảm thấy thế nào. Dùng câu bị động.
writing_prompts.example: Yesterday, our class was taken on a fascinating tour of a local food processing factory. We were shown around the entire facility by a friendly guide who explained every step of the production process. First, fresh vegetables are washed and sorted by machines. Then they are cut into the right sizes and are cooked at exactly the right temperature. Every product is carefully checked and tested before it is packaged. The temperature in each section is constantly monitored by computers. At the end, we were given free samples of the products and were really impressed by how everything was so clean and organised. It was a very educational experience.
